description: ApostropheCMS is an open-source Node.js content management system for building websites and headless CMS projects. It provides page, piece, media, user, and localization capabilities that can be used in traditional or headless architectures.
summary: ApostropheCMS exposes a self-hosted REST API with OpenAPI spec and a public npm-based CLI; no GraphQL or MCP server was found on apostrophecms.com.
